description: Ambient context layer: `compose init` scaffolds `docs/context/` with `tech-stack.md`, `conventions.md`, `decisions.md`. These are injected into every agent prompt during `compose build` as read-only context. Updated manually or via `compose context update`.

completions.notes: Stale-row reconcile (sweep 2026-06-16). Ambient context layer shipped (Wave 3 03ebfff): compose init scaffolds docs/context/{tech-stack,conventions,decisions}.md; loadAmbientContext injects them into every agent prompt. Tested. feature.json never reconciled from PLANNED.
